quote: None are more hopelessly enslaved than those who falsely believe they are free. – Johann Wolfgang von Goethe
fact: A Czech man, Jan Honza Zampa, holds the record for drinking one liter of beer in 4.11 seconds.
joke:
My friend keeps telling me "Cheer up. You aren't stuck in a deep hole in the ground, filled with water."
I know he means well.
